IIT Bombay.notes: Best startup ecosystem among all IITs. Mumbai location gives VC access.

IIT Delhi.incubator: FITT (Foundation for Innovation and Technology Transfer)
IIT Delhi.notes: Strong for fintech and B2B SaaS startups. Good government policy access.

IIT Madras.incubator: IITM Research Park + IITM Incubation Cell
IIT Madras.notes: Strongest for deep tech and hardware startups. Research park is India's largest.

notable_startups: Multiple manufacturing and core tech startups
IIT Kharagpur.incubator: Rajendra Mishra School of Engineering Entrepreneurship
IIT Kharagpur.funding_access: Moderate — far from major VC hubs
IIT Kharagpur.notes: Good for core engineering startups. Location is a disadvantage for consumer tech.

IIT Kanpur.notes: Strong for quant and AI startups. Excellent CS + math foundation.

IIIT Hyderabad.notes: Best for AI/ML product startups. Strong research-to-product pipeline.

Computer Science and Engineering.typical_startups: SaaS, AI products, fintech, consumer apps
Computer Science and Engineering.time_to_first_startup: Often during college or within 2 years of graduation

Mathematics and Computing.time_to_first_startup: Usually post 2-3 years for financial runway

Electrical Engineering.typical_startups: Hardware, IoT, semiconductor IP, EV tech
Electrical Engineering.time_to_first_startup: Usually post 3-5 years due to capital requirements

general_advice.key_success_factor: Network and peer group matters more than branch for startups
